## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] App/manual flow checked where relevant

## Risk Notes

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private customer messages, receipt images, payment proof, or exact addresses were added to client code, logs, docs, or analytics.
- [ ] Payment/receipt changes keep human review required and do not imply screenshots are automatic proof of payment.
- [ ] Backend/integration changes keep private provider calls behind Supabase Edge Functions.
